Event: Mushroom Loot - April 2026
Event Date: 09/04/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AX32
Crouching Tiger Axe

When attacking, has a 50% chance of dealing 190% splash damage.
Every once in a while, the fighter throws axes at 4 random enemy fighters. Axes, upon hitting, steal 25% of all parameters from the targets for 5 seconds and frighten the targets for 4 seconds. Also, when the axes hit, the targets lose armor. They lose 65% of their armor parameters and cannot use armor abilities for 4 seconds.
Additionally, the targets receive pure damage equal to 40% of the maximum health of the axe owner.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 10 secs
